subcodes.first_line: Do not be grieved at the ascension of your noble son, for this world is narrow and confined, the cosmos is a battlefield, and every single atom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از صعود ولد جلیل محزون مباشید زیرا این جهان تنگ است کیهان جنگ است جمیع ذرات
subcodes.subjects: @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort
